original_title: SSPD-162 The Island Of Shame Special Edition Tsubasa Hachino
overview: Buy an uninhabited island and build a facility for him ● breeding. The abducted women are confined as a guy. Breeding as a sex slave for seeding ●, giving birth to children while taking customers every day. And the same thing for that child ... Guy ● Training, human trafficking, prostitution, strong ● Pregnancy, organ trading ... An island dominated by a devil who can never escape ... That is "He ● Island".
